name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services at physical locations nationwide with same-day or next-day funding options.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating a nationwide network of physical store locations that provide rapid access to emergency cash and alternative financial products. The company has been serving consumers who need quick access to funds for unexpected expenses or financial gaps. ACE operates through brick-and-mortar locations where customers can access services in person, with a primary focus on speed and convenience for those outside traditional banking systems.

ACE Cash Express offers a diverse range of financial products including installment loans, title loans (collateral-based borrowing), check cashing services, bill payment processing, money transfers, and tax preparation services. They also provide business services and maintain an online loan platform for eligible customers. The company markets itself as a one-stop financial services hub for consumers seeking alternatives to traditional banks, particularly for short-term liquidity needs.

ACE differentiates itself through its extensive physical retail presence—customers can walk into a store and potentially receive funding the same day or next business day. This in-person accessibility appeals to consumers without strong online banking relationships or those who prefer face-to-face financial transactions. The company also provides multiple complementary services beyond just lending, including check cashing and bill payments, positioning itself as a financial convenience center.

However, the website content provided is limited, with 404 errors on specific location and service pages, making detailed current offerings difficult to verify. No specific APR ranges, fees, or loan terms are disclosed in the available content. Consumers should verify product availability in their specific state before applying, as the website indicates some products are not available in all states. Like all emergency lending products, ACE's offerings typically come with significantly higher costs than traditional bank loans.
pros: Multiple service offerings in one location (loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, tax services)
Physical store locations nationwide for in-person service and same-day or next-day funding
Title loans available for customers with vehicle equity
Online loan application option for eligible customers
Installment loans available alongside payday-style products
Established company with long operating history and recognizable brand
Customer service available via phone and email
cons: Website navigation issues and 404 errors prevent viewing detailed terms, rates, and fees
No APR, fee schedule, or specific loan terms disclosed in available content
Product availability varies by state with unclear eligibility information
Limited information about loan amounts, repayment terms, or approval requirements
As an emergency lender, products likely carry high APRs typical of the industry
best_for: Consumers needing same-day or next-day cash access for emergencies
Customers with vehicle title equity seeking collateral-based loans
Unbanked or underbanked consumers preferring in-person financial services
Individuals needing multiple services (check cashing, bill pay) at one location
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers in emergency situations who need rapid access to small amounts of cash and prefer in-person transactions at physical locations. The primary caveat is that emergency lending products from ACE likely carry substantially higher costs (APR, fees) than traditional bank loans, and detailed pricing information is not available on the accessible portions of their website—customers must contact them directly or visit a store to understand true borrowing costs.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
